# Changelog

All notable changes to this project will be documented in this file.

The format is based on [Conventional Changelog](https://github.com/conventional-changelog/conventional-changelog-config-spec/blob/master/versions/2.2.0/README.md),
and this project adheres to [Semantic Versioning](https://semver.org/spec/v2.0.0.html).

## [v0.2.0](https://github.com/liblaf/lazy-loader/releases/tag/v0.2.0) - 2026-03-31

### 💥 BREAKING CHANGES

- `attach_stub` now takes `(name, file, package=None)`. Update existing calls from `attach_stub(__name__, __package__, __file__)` to `attach_stub(__name__, __file__, __package__)`. - [6095323](https://github.com/liblaf/lazy-loader/commit/6095323836d782966c8e6d62fb2daf383521d317) by [@liblaf](https://github.com/liblaf)

### ✨ Features

- **\[breaking\]** make attach_stub use file-first arguments - [6095323](https://github.com/liblaf/lazy-loader/commit/6095323836d782966c8e6d62fb2daf383521d317) by [@liblaf](https://github.com/liblaf)

### ♻️ Code Refactoring

- **(lazy_loader)** model stub exports with getters - [a605952](https://github.com/liblaf/lazy-loader/commit/a6059527a1200dc32bc01237e3b401c5b84f0374) by [@liblaf](https://github.com/liblaf)

### 🛠 Builds

- switch project tooling to nox and uv - [b6e641a](https://github.com/liblaf/lazy-loader/commit/b6e641a4d78ad20eba57d7d05f8f5bf84c9241b9) by [@liblaf](https://github.com/liblaf)

### ❤️ Contributors

- [@liblaf](https://github.com/liblaf)
- [@liblaf[bot]](https://github.com/apps/liblaf)
